name: OLD NATIONAL BANCORP /IN/
summary: PART I COMPANY PROFILE Old National Bancorp, the financial holding company of Old National Bank, our wholly owned banking subsidiary (Old National Bank), is incorporated in the state of Indiana, is the sixth largest Midwestern-headquartered bank by asset size with consolidated assets of $72.2 billion at December 31, 2025, and ranks among the top 25 banking companies headquartered in the United States. The Companys corporate headquarters and principal executive office are located in Evansville, I...
